name: Pet And Service Animal
description: Leasing coordinates pet screening, service animal or ESA accommodation review, pet agreement drafts, and fee or rent packets with human approval before resident, legal, money, lease, or PMS action.

stages.name: Normalize Pet Or Accommodation Request
stages.description: Normalize the request type and missing screening or accommodation facts.

steps.title: Normalize pet request
steps.instructions: Normalize applicant or resident, property, unit, animal type, pet vs service animal vs ESA claim, animal count, breed/weight if provided, documentation refs, lease restrictions, assistance-animal sensitivity, existing approvals, fees, pet rent, and missing facts. Unknown accommodation eligibility, legal conclusions, fee eligibility, or animal details must remain null with needs_verification.
steps.dispatch_body: Normalize animal request facts and missing-data flags. No resident sends, denials, approvals, fees, lease changes, or AppFolio writes.

steps.title: Check policy and history
steps.instructions: Check property pet policy, lease terms, prior approvals, screening state, fair-housing sensitivity, and whether a human or legal reviewer already owns the request. Do not approve, deny, request documents, or send messages.
steps.dispatch_title: Check pet policy and request history
steps.dispatch_body: Check policy, history, and fair-housing sensitivity. No external sends or system writes.

stages.name: Draft Review Packet
stages.description: Prepare screening or accommodation materials without deciding the request.

steps.title: Draft pet review packet
steps.instructions: Draft review packet with policy match, screening refs, accommodation caveats, missing documentation request draft, pet agreement draft, fee/rent recommendation if allowed, and legal-review flag. Draft-only; do not approve, deny, request documents, charge fees, or alter leases.
steps.dispatch_title: Draft pet or accommodation review packet
steps.dispatch_body: Draft review packet only. No approval, denial, fees, resident sends, lease changes, or system writes.

steps.title: Review pet packet
steps.instructions: Review screening, accommodation sensitivity, missing documentation, fees, agreement language, and legal-review need before any resident-facing decision or system update is prepared for approval.
steps.human_prompt: Review pet or accommodation packet before resident, legal, fee, lease, or PMS action.

stages.name: Approve And Stage Outcome
stages.description: Human approval gates the outcome and all resident or system actions.

steps.title: Approve pet action
steps.instructions: Approve, edit, reject, or route to counsel before any accommodation decision, pet approval, denial, documentation request, fee, pet rent, agreement update, lease change, resident message, owner update, or AppFolio write.
steps.human_prompt: Approval required before pet or accommodation decision, resident send, fee, lease, legal, owner, or system action.

steps.title: Stage approved pet package
steps.instructions: Stage approved resident draft, agreement or accommodation packet, fee/rent metadata if approved, legal-review notes, unresolved needs_verification facts, and next owner for human release. Do not send, decide, charge, alter leases, or write systems.
steps.dispatch_title: Stage approved pet or accommodation package
steps.dispatch_body: Stage approved pet/accommodation package for human release. No external sends, fees, lease changes, or system writes.
